notes: Click-after-match crash root-caused: spawn_bullet/spawn_hit_burst/spawn_death_burst were calling add_child on a freed bullets_root/fx_root during teardown — held LMB during the 1–2 frame window crashed the engine. Now null-guarded + state-gated on player/bot. Crosshair size slider in SETTINGS (0.6x – 2.0x) with live preview tile. HOME panel rebuilt as a real AAA top bar — animated wave background, side glows, level pill + XP bar, animated PULSE/SURGE glyphs, quick-stat chips.
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
